title: Argentinian Tomato Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Argentinian-inspired dish featuring fresh tomatoes and creamy sauce wrapped in a crispy wrap.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
2. Warm the tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
3. Spread the creamy sauce on the tortilla, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
4. Arrange the sliced tomatoes on top of the sauce.
5. Drizzle the Argentinian chimichurri over the tomatoes.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Fold the bottom edge of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
9. Cook the wrap in the preheated pan for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
